title: teucrium quadratum var. ambiguum
intro: Teucrium quadratum var. ambiguum, also known as the Woodland Germander, is a plant species belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and soothe respiratory problems. The health benefits of Woodland Germander include its potential to alleviate symptoms of IBS (Irritable Bowel Syndrome), reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, it is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health issues.
